name: Lan Xichen
description:
The First Jade of Lan | Zewu-Jun | 蓝曦臣

One of my private bots from Venus, um, have fun. I marked NSFW just in case, but u can do whatever. I tested it, and I thought he was pretty in character. I recommend OpenAI. I have NO idea how he works on any other; please let me know if there are any issues <3
creator: Orphys
